title: hotfix: fix new log functions being incompatible with pyosys
body:
_What are the reasons/motivation for this change?_

With the changes starting in d34ac0c87d5a31eacfe9c8ae0ad350f72ba90349, the wrapper generator fails to wrap the log functions as it doesn't know how to deal with FmtString.

_Explain how this is achieved._

I modified the python wrapper generator script with corner-case handlers such that functions that start with `log_formatted` have the format string coerced to `"%s"` and also have an alias without the `_formatted` part.

Contrary to intuition this was the least hacky way of doing it with this file.

_If applicable, please suggest to reviewers how they can test the change._

```
#!/bin/sh
expect_yosys_ok() {
	./yosys -Qy <(echo "$1") 2>&1 | grep "foo" || echo "FAIL: $1"
}
expect_yosys_error() {
	./yosys -Qy <(echo "$1") 2>&1 | grep 'ERROR: foo' || echo "FAIL: $1"
}

expect_yosys_ok 'import libyosys as ys; d = ys.Design(); ys.log_header(d, "foo\n")'
expect_yosys_ok 'import libyosys as ys; d = ys.Design(); ys.log_formatted_header(d, "foo\n")'
expect_yosys_ok 'import libyosys as ys; ys.log("foo\n")'
expect_yosys_ok 'import libyosys as ys; ys.log_formatted_string("foo\n")'
expect_yosys_ok 'import libyosys as ys; ys.log_warning("foo\n")'
expect_yosys_ok 'import libyosys as ys; ys.log_formatted_warning("foo\n")'
expect_yosys_ok 'import libyosys as ys; ys.log_warning_noprefix("foo\n")'
expect_yosys_ok 'import libyosys as ys; ys.log_formatted_warning_noprefix("foo\n")'
expect_yosys_ok 'import libyosys as ys; ys.log_file_info("foo.ys", 1, "foo\n")'
expect_yosys_ok 'import libyosys as ys; ys.log_formatted_file_info("foo.ys", 1, "foo\n")'
expect_yosys_ok 'import libyosys as ys; ys.log_file_warning("foo.ys", 1, "foo\n")'
expect_yosys_ok 'import libyosys as ys; ys.log_formatted_file_warning("foo.ys", 1, "foo\n")'
expect_yosys_error 'import libyosys as ys; ys.log_error("foo\n")'
expect_yosys_error 'import libyosys as ys; ys.log_formatted_error("foo\n")'
expect_yosys_error 'import libyosys as ys; ys.log_file_error("foo.ys", 1, "foo\n")'
expect_yosys_error 'import libyosys as ys; ys.log_formatted_file_error("foo.ys", 1, "foo\n")'
```

---

Resolves #5343
